channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 18th May
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 800 x 800 x 42mm NOT MARKED (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 18th May
item.description:
15MDB CWED 5000 x 600 x 50mm NOT MARKED (CW10 Edge Deterioration)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th May
item.description:
15MDB OVERGROWN HEDGE OBSTRUCTING BENDS SIGN PLEASE CUT BACK TO ENSURE VISIBILITY (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th May
item.description:
Cway pothole Permanent repair 1600mmx1200mmx41mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole dangerous, 18th May
item.description:
Halfway along cold Slad lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree growth back to boundary approx 2 metres x 1 metres (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway closure please cut back overgrown tree branches back to boundary approx 7 metres x 3 metres (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 18th May
item.description:
